name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy series is from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami Re-edition series, cleverly incorporating the bright tones of the Japanese artist into the Monogram coated canvas. Calfskin trim outlines the close-fitting structure, and the nameplate is embellished with an elegant bow detail. Model: M13085. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)
